title: bstar Cotton Garden Gloves Flora Light Duty Summer Gardening Home Indoor Outdoor Works

description: Description: These cotton gloves excellent comfortable and fit - ideal for general jobs in the gardening, agriculture, construction, general maintenance. Features: Soft and comfortable light-duty cotton gloves Ideal for garden and home works Extra protection for manicured nails Easy washable, durable and breathable Using micro dotting for great grips Floral printing for fashion with knit wrist Note: Wash after work
